methodology.edge_retention: XGBoost + RF + Ridge ensemble trained on CATRA TCC mm measurements (objective machine test)
methodology.toughness: Physics-based model (CVF, PM, eutectoid boundary, matrix composition) calibrated against Charpy ft-lbs
methodology.corrosion_resistance: Physics calculation from matrix Cr, PREN, and nitrogen content
methodology.ease_of_sharpening: Physics-based inverse wear resistance (CVF, VC hardness, WC content)
methodology.use_case_scores: Weighted combination of base properties with domain-specific weights

validation.note: Validated privately against 61 KnifeSteelNerds corrosion ratings; KSN data is an external validation reference only and is not redistributed. Figures shown are from that reference run.
